sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after 6 total clicks
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Wall start at key rows:")
for row in [1, 16, 24, 36, 44, 52, 63]:
    line = ascii_lines[row]
    for j, c in enumerate(line):
        if c == 'G':
            print(f"  Row {row}: wall at col {j}")
            break

print("\nFigure position:")
for row in range(52, 58):
    line = ascii_lines[row]
    for j, c in enumerate(line):
        if c == 'c':
            print(f"  Row {row}: figure at col {j}")
            break

print("\nGap position:")
for row in range(40, 44):
    line = ascii_lines[row]
    for j, c in enumerate(line):
        if c == 'N':
            print(f"  Row {row}: gap at col {j}")
            break

print("\nRow 52 slice:")
print(f"  {ascii_lines[52][:40]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
